title: GST27 Election or Revocation of an Election to Deem Certain Supplies to be Financial Services for GST/HST Purposes - Canada.ca
content:
## GST27 Election or Revocation of an Election to Deem Certain Supplies to be Financial Services for GST/HST Purposes

## Notice to the reader
You can submit your request electronically using the “File an election” service in My Business Account or Represent a Client .
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
This form is for a corporation that is a member of a closely-related group, of which at least one member is a financial institution, and the corporation wants to treat taxable supplies between members as financial services. The form can also be used to revoke this arrangement.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (gst27-fill-22e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (gst27-fill-22e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (gst27-22e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (gst27-22e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
